leadText: Red Bell Pepper (Japanese: あかパプリカスライス Red Paprika Slice) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An ingredient with some bitterness—but its bitter notes and overall flavor are pleasantly mild compared to its green cousin.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 240 $ 60 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An ingredient with some bitterness—but its bitter notes and overall flavor are pleasantly mild compared to its green cousin. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Deli Cioso , Aquiesta Supermarket (after earning 3 Gym Badges ) S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium )
